layout_and_spacing.radius: rounded-lg (8px max to keep it sharp and technical)
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Strict grid hierarchy, dense and compact. Data-heavy areas should utilize every pixel effectively.

surface_strategies.cards: Flat solid background (`bg-[#121212]`), sharp edges (`rounded-lg`), 1px solid stroke (`border border-white/10`). No drop shadows. Hover states should brighten border (`hover:border-white/20`) and slightly lift.
surface_strategies.header: Solid background with hard bottom border to separate from scrollable content.
surface_strategies.ad_containers: Subtle bordered container with a small 'Advertisement' overline. Image acts as a placeholder banner.

components.charts: Use Recharts. Line charts for price trends. Hide axes and grid lines for mini-sparklines in grid cards; show detailed axes for expanded views.
components.search: Shadcn UI Input with dark theme overrides. Left aligned icon.
components.grid: Bento-style or strict 3-4 column grid for stock listings.

adsense_placeholders.description: Sleek dark luxury car banner - Use for Header or Horizontal Ad
Dark premium watch close up - Use for Sidebar Ad
Luxury wristwatch metal band - Use for In-content Square Ad

motion_and_interactions.loading: Use skeleton loaders with `animate-pulse` using `#1E1E1E` backgrounds.
motion_and_interactions.price_flash: Briefly flash green/red background on price update, fading out quickly.

instructions_to_main_agent: Inject Google Fonts for 'Manrope' and 'IBM Plex Sans' in index.html.
Configure Tailwind with the custom colors: background (#0A0A0A), surface (#121212), up (#00C805), down (#FF3B30).
Set global styles to apply Dark Theme (body bg to #0A0A0A, text to #FFFFFF).
Fetch Indian stock data from http://nse-api-khaki.vercel.app:5000 (Specifically NIFTY50 if possible, or build an array of NIFTY50 symbols to fetch).
Implement an auto-refresh mechanism every 30 seconds for live prices.
Create a 'Control Room' grid layout: A sidebar (with nav + sidebar ad), a main header (search + horizontal ad), and the main content area (stock grid).
In the stock grid, build dense cards for each stock showing symbol, current price, change %, and a Recharts mini line chart (sparkline) of recent trend.
Implement real-time search filtering on the stocks array.
Place the provided dummy AdSense placeholder images appropriately: header_banner at top, sidebar_banner in side panel, content_banner inserted in the grid flow.
Use Shadcn UI where applicable (Inputs, Dialogs) but strip 'Vercel-look' and apply the technical Performance Pro dark styles (1px borders, no shadows).
Ensure all interactive elements have 'data-testid' attributes.
